hooks.command: $in=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd()|ConvertFrom-Json; $f=$in.tool_input.file_path; if ($f -notlike '*src/components/*' -and $f -notlike '*src\components\*') { exit 0 }; if (Select-String -Path src\* -Pattern 'electronAPI' -Recurse -Quiet) { exit 1 }; if (Select-String -Path src\components\* -Pattern '@keyframes nl-' -Recurse -Quiet) { exit 1 }; if (Select-String -Path src\* -Pattern 'window.MacWindow' -Recurse -Quiet) { exit 1 }; exit 0

$in=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd()|ConvertFrom-Json; $f=$in.tool_input.file_path; if ($f -like '*src-tauri/capabilities/default.json' -or $f -like '*src-tauri\capabilities\default.json') { Write-Host 'Reminder: re-audit src-tauri/capabilities/default.json against every vendor service, HTTP host, dialog scope, and fs scope before committing.' }
